Tests the `indexOf` method of the `String` object to verify it returns the correct index.

# Purpose
This code is a simple test script that uses an assertion to verify the behavior of the `String.prototype.indexOf` method in JavaScript. It checks that calling `indexOf` on the string `"abcd"` with the substring `"ab"` returns `0`, which indicates that the substring `"ab"` is found at the start of the string. The use of `assert` ensures that the test will throw an error if the condition is not met, which helps in validating the correctness of the `indexOf` method. This script provides narrow functionality focused on a specific test case for string manipulation.
